channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Verify That Your GitHub Actions Deployment Actually Landed on the Server
item.description: How to Verify? GitHub Actions said ✅ Success. The server disagreed. We kept running into a subtle CI/CD problem: after pushing to main, GitHub marked the deployment as successful — but checking...

item.title: v0 by Vercel Review: AI-Generated UI Components That Actually Ship
item.description: I spent a week generating 35 UI components with v0 by Vercel to understand where it fits in a real development workflow. The tool occupies a narrow but valuable niche: it does not write backend...

item.title: Real-World Recommendation Systems in Fintech: Moving Beyond Collaborative Filtering
item.description: Why the standard ML playbook breaks in financial services - and a practical architecture for recommendation engines that actually survive production. If you've built a recommendation system...

item.title: Garden Visualizer - Would Results Improve Using Example Images? (Screenshots Included)
item.description: Perfect Prompts Needed? In creating a garden visualizer to help home owners with their landscape decisions, I assumed that I needed to "program" the text prompt perfectly in order to give good...

item.title: Post-Mortem: How My Web Game Hit 130k MAU with $0 Marketing (and Survived an AdSense Ban)
item.description: A transparent case study on indie game growth: from accidental multi-language localization to a successful B2B pivot in the US market, and scaling revenue after an AdSense restriction. For the...

item.title: AI-Assisted Writing: Our Disclosure Policy and Ethics Stance
item.description: Every article on Pickuma is produced with AI assistance, and every article tells you so. The aiAssisted: true flag in our frontmatter is not a legal disclaimer we hope you will overlook. It is a...

item.title: Notion AI for PMs in 2026: Workflow, Limits, and What Actually Saves Time
item.description: The premise that doesn't survive contact Notion's pitch for AI inside the workspace is that it eliminates the "context-switching tax" — instead of copy-pasting your meeting notes into ChatGPT,...

item.title: LangChain Interrupt: Agents Moved Into the Runtime | Focused
item.description: Interrupt felt different this year. Less model worship. More runtime. Instead of another round of model worship, the more useful conversations at the conference took a more practical turn. Agents...

item.title: Agentic Payments Move Spending Authority Into the Runtime | Focused Labs
item.description: Agentic payments are arriving before payment authority has an owner. At LangChain Interrupt there was a constant return to a payment question for agentic AI: what to do with AI agents that need to...

item.title: I Spent My Time Building Tokens on Solana. What Got Me Surprised? Read This.
item.description: I want to tell you something nobody told me before I started this. Building tokens on Solana is not complicated. The CLI does most of the heavy lifting. You run a few commands, something appears...

item.title: Why Google’s AI can’t spell Google (or anything else)
item.description: Google is embarrassing itself, again.

item.title: Illinois Lawmakers Just Passed America’s Strongest AI Safety Bill
item.description: The bill requires companies like OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google to have third parties confirm they’re following safety standards. Illinois governor JB Pritzker says he’ll sign it.

item.title: A Google employee allegedly used inside information to win $1.2 million on Polymarket
item.description: Federal prosecutors charged a Google employee with fraud after he allegedly made $1.2 million on Polymarket bets related to Search-related trends in 2025, as reported earlier by ABC News. In their...

item.title: Apple’s newest iPad Air is up to $100 off for the first time
item.description: If you want an iPad that’s more powerful than the entry-level model but less expensive than the iPad Pro, the latest iPad Air is the one to buy, and it’s down to one its best prices to date. The...

item.title: Websites have a new way to spy on visitors: analyzing their SSD activity
item.description: Telltale SSD activity can be measured in the browser using simple JavaScript.

item.title: All the news about Ferrari’s polarizing Luce EV
item.description: Ferrari fans don’t like the design of the new Luce EV, an electric four-door sedan that just doesn’t look like the Ferraris of old. It was designed with help from Jony Ive’s LoveFrom, but what...

item.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
item.description: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

item.title: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
item.description: After first being announced in December 2024, Lux Optics has finally released the latest version of its Halide camera app for the iPhone and iPad. The Halide Mark III app's most compelling feature...

item.title: Facebook launches a ‘Plus’ subscription that gives you extra features
item.description: After announcing tests of premium subscriptions for Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp earlier this year, TechCrunch and Bloomberg report that Meta is launching a global rollout over the next few weeks...

item.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
item.description: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI...

item.title: Roids were all the rage at the Enhanced Games
item.description: In Las Vegas, the blazing sun beats down on a makeshift Olympic-length pool. Cody Miller stands on the starting block of lane one. His arms are raised in victory. MC Hammer's "U Can't Touch This"...

item.title: Your SEO strategy is optimized for a search engine that no longer exists.
item.description: Google I/O made it official: AI-generated answers are now front and center in search, and most brands have almost no visibility into how AI is describing them to their customers. For anyone who...

item.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
item.description: Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide, while also testing new AI, creator, and business-focused offerings under its broader “Meta One”...

item.title: Huawei's ‘Chip Queen’ Throws Down the Gauntlet
item.description: The Chinese company is adapting to the demise of Moore’s Law, which guides chip production. It could complicate US chip dominance.

item.title: Valve raises Steam Deck prices by more than $200
item.description: Valve has significantly increased the price of the Steam Deck - but now, it's also in stock. The 512GB Steam Deck OLED now costs $789, up from $549, while the 1TB model costs $949, up from $649....

item.title: ITBench-AA: Frontier Models Score Below 50% on the First Benchmark for Agentic Enterprise IT Tasks — by Artificial Analysis and IBM
The Verge’s 2026 college graduation gift guide
item.description: Graduating from college is exciting, but it can also feel slightly terrifying. Along with celebrating a huge accomplishment, many grads jump right into looking for a job. Some might be getting...

item.title: You can print, slice, and engrave using this desktop crafting machine
item.description: xTool has announced a new multi-purpose crafting machine that could potentially be one of the most affordable ways to start an Etsy shop. Its modular design facilitates a CMYK print head that...

item.title: Grandoreiro Malware and BTMOB RAT Campaigns Target Windows and Android Users
item.description: Latin America and Europe become the target of two banking trojan campaigns that are designed to infect Windows and Android devices with Grandoreiro and BTMOB malware, respectively. That's...

item.title: AI coding startup Cognition raises $1B at $25B pre-money valuation
item.description: As Cognition reaches $492 million in annualized revenue run rate, it more than doubled its valuation in eight months, it says.
